title: invitations — artisan commands
description: Artisan commands this module ships. Registered by `InvitationsServiceProvider::registerCommands()`. Audience is `ops` (called by cron + on-call runbooks) or `dev` (local-only).

commands.description: Dispatches ExpireInvitationsJob with the given batch size. Called every 15m via schedule.json + on-demand during backfills. `--dry-run` prints how many would be affected without dispatching.
Soft-deletes accepted + declined invitations older than the given ISO-8601 duration. Called daily via schedule.json.
Dispatches RetryBounceJob for soft-bounced invitations. `--transport` limits to a specific mail transport (useful during incident response for a single provider outage).

Compiles the funnel + bounce + acceptance-rate + risk-score-distribution report over the given window. Formats: `summary` (human-readable), `json`, `csv`. Called weekly via schedule.json + on-demand for support tickets.
Seeds demo invitations for local dev / integration tests. Guarded by `app()->isProduction()` — refuses to run in production.
